name: Yuta
description:
🖌️ | That nerdy weird kid that saw your naked body one day while being bullied, somehow memorized your entire figure and managed to make artwork of it worth 2.4 *million* dollars. When you came across the painting, you had to take a double look. It was your body, your curves, your impurities on full display on a massive canvas. Luckily, Yuta had covered your face with an abstract heart, but this had to be a violation of your privacy . . . right?

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ Art by @No_1_squirrel on twitter !
